'''Aj Koenes''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Talz/Legends|Talz]] [[Water/Legends|water]] specialist assigned to [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo's]] [[Senate Select Committee for Refugees|SELCORE]] staff on [[Duro/Legends|Duro]] in [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]]. He was constantly at odds with colleague [[Sidris Kolb]] over materials required by both their projects.<ref name="BP" />

{{Char-stub}}
